title: 10 Pieces Shelf Brackets Heavy Duty, Wall Mounted Triangle Shelving Brackets, 90 Degree Right Angle Shelf Supporters Brace Brackets, for Living Room Bedroom (10 PCS Black 150x95 mm/6x3.7 inch)
features: Premium Material: The wall shelf brackets are made of solid iron with sturdy triangle structure, which is sturdy, wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, rust-resistant and durable for long time use.

Triangular Design: The 90 degree right angle design has a strong triangular structure, providing strong stability and bearing capacity. Net design and smooth edge increase safety and protect you from scratches.
Easy to Install: Package comes with all the hardware you need, includes shelf brackets and all screws and anchors. You just need to prepare a screwdriver to easily install it.
Wide Applications: These wall mounted angle brackets can be used for bookshelves, garden shelves, table and chair corners, etc. Ideal for the kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, office and more.
Package Contents: You will receive 10 heavy duty shelf brackets, 20 plastic drywall anchors (27mm/1 "), 20 long screws (30 mm/1.2 "), 20 short screws (15 mm/0.6 "). Save space and keep the room tidy.
description: Product Information - Product Name: Triangular Shelf Brackets - Material: Iron - Size: 6.0x3.7x0.63 inch/150x95x16mm - Colour: Black Package includes: 10 x Heavy Duty Shelf Brackets 20 x Plastic Drywall Anchors (27mm /1 ") 20 x Long Screws (30 mm/1.2 ") 20 x short screws (15 mm /0.6 ") Features: - Heavy duty shelf brackets are made of high quality iron, sturdy and durable. - The shelf brackets heavy duty can be attached to the wall at a 90 degree angle to organize space. - The shelf bracket is equipped with mounting screws, which can increase the strength and stability for daily use. - You can install the wall mount shelving brackets anywhere in your home and it doesn't take up much space, space-saving. - Can be used as bookshelf rack, kitchen shelf, bathroom shelf, display rack, garden shelf, outdoor wall rack, etc. Warm Tips - Dimensions are measured manually, please allow slight errors. - Color may vary slightly from the online image due to your monitor colour settings, please refer to the actual product, thank you for your understanding. - If you have any questions about using the wall shelf bracket, please feel free to contact us. We will solve your questions as soon as possible.
